title: Structured Output, Pydantic, JSON Schema, Validation, and Repair · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in strict versioned agent output boundary and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Use structured output for final typed data and function calling for intermediate actions rather than confusing the two contracts.
Validate provider output with strict Pydantic models, explicit bounds, discriminated variants, forbidden extras, and actionable errors.
Generate, inspect, version, and test the supported JSON Schema subset instead of assuming provider and local validators implement every keyword.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Output Repair Policy
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-output-repair-policy-rrt2pv" that uses case 8125 to validate structured final output with versioned Pydantic and JSON Schema contracts, explicit rejection, and bounded repair. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Output Repair Policy.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Output Repair Policy into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Output Repair Policy, keep Output Repair Policy connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-output-repair-policy-rrt2pv
# Competency: agentpy-output-repair-policy.
# Case 8125: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_output_repair_policy_rrt2pv(candidate_outputs: int = 24, valid_outputs: int = 15, rejected_outputs: int = 9, schema_versions: int = 3, unsafe_coercions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_rrt2pv = "rrt2pv-vp2trr-8125"
    assert evidence_variant_rrt2pv
    evidence_axes_rrt2pv = (
        "authorityrrt2pv",
        "interaction8125",
        "toolvp2trr",
        "staterrt2pv8125",
        "evaluation8125rrt2pv",
        "recoveryvp2trr8125",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_rrt2pv)) == 6
    if candidate_outputs < 1 or valid_outputs < 0 or rejected_outputs < 0:
        return False, candidate_outputs, "output-count"
    if valid_outputs + rejected_outputs != candidate_outputs:
        return False, valid_outputs, "output-reconciliation"
    if schema_versions < 2:
        return False, schema_versions, "schema-version"
    if unsafe_coercions > 0:
        return False, unsafe_coercions, "unsafe-coercion"
    assert valid_outputs + rejected_outputs == candidate_outputs and unsafe_coercions == 0
    return True, valid_outputs, "strict-structured-output"
